title: 📄 arXiv — AI Security — Evaluation of Automatic Speech Recognition Using Generative
body:

Embedding-based semantic metrics are better correlated with human perception, but decoder-based Large Language Models (LLMs) remain underexplored for this task. This…

title: 📄 arXiv — AI Security — Long-Horizon Manipulation via Trace-Conditioned VLA Planning
body:

title: 📄 arXiv — AI Security — CrossCommitVuln-Bench: A Dataset of Multi-Commit Python Vuln
body:
🟡 We present CrossCommitVuln-Bench, a curated benchmark of 15 real-world Python vulnerabilities (CVEs) in which the exploitable condition was introduced across multiple commits - each individually benign to per-commit static analysis - but collectively critical. We manually annotate each CVE with its…

title: 📄 arXiv — AI Security — MathDuels: Evaluating LLMs as Problem Posers and Solvers
body:
🟡 As frontier language models attain near-ceiling performance on static mathematical benchmarks, existing evaluations are increasingly unable to differentiate model capabilities, largely because they cast models solely as solvers of fixed problem sets. We introduce MathDuels, a self-play benchmark in…

title: 🤖 arXiv — MCP & Agents — Seeing Fast and Slow: Learning the Flow of Time in Videos
body:
🟡 How can we tell whether a video has been sped up or slowed down? How can we generate videos at different speeds? Although videos have been central to modern computer vision research, little attention has been paid to perceiving and controlling the passage of time. In this paper, we study time as a…

body:

body:

title: 🤖 arXiv — MCP & Agents — Characterizing Streaming Decidability of CSPs via Non-Redund
body:

title: 🔬 Anthropic Safety — Interpretability
body: 🟡 The mission of the Interpretability team is to discover and understand how large language models work internally, as a foundation for AI safety and positive outcomes.

title: 🔬 Anthropic Safety — Societal Impacts
body: 🟡 Working closely with the Anthropic Policy and Safeguards teams, Societal Impacts is a technical research team that explores how AI is used in the real world.

title: 🔬 Anthropic Safety — Frontier Red Team
body: 🟡 The Frontier Red Team analyzes the implications of frontier AI models for cybersecurity, biosecurity, and autonomous systems.

title: 🔬 Anthropic Safety — Emotion concepts and their function in a large language mode
body: 🟡 All modern language models sometimes act like they have emotions. What’s behind these behaviors? Our interpretability team investigates.
